zh.lifeSummary: William Sandes是William Sandes的兒子，於大約1431年出生在英國哈普爾費費爾德。他和Joanna至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1493年1月10日在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 馬洛福享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Sandes是William Sandes的儿子，于大约1431年出生在英国哈普爾費費爾德。他和Joanna至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1493年1月10日在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 馬洛福享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: William Sandes was born about 1431, in Fyfield, Hampshire, England as the son of William Sandes. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joanna. He died on 10 January 1493, in Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: William Sandes est né environ 1431, à Fyfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, fils de William Sandes. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joanna. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1493, à Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Sandes wurde um 1431 in Fyfield, Hampshire, England, als Sohn von William Sandes geboren. Er hatte mit Joanna mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1493 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Sandes è nato il circa 1431 nel Fyfield, Hampshire, England come figlio di William Sandes. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joanna. Morì il 10 gennaio 1493, nel Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sandesは約1431年にイギリスハンプシュアイアフイフィールドでWilliam Sandesの息子として生まれた。彼はJoannaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1493年1月10日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト マルロウで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sandes(은)는 대략 1431년 영국 함프실르 피필드에서 William Sandes의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Joanna(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 1월 10일 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 말를로에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Sandes nasceu aproximadamente 1431, em Fyfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra filho de William Sandes. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joanna. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1493, em Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Sandes родился около 1431 г. в местности фифиелд, хампшир, Англия. Его отца звали William Sandes. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joanna. Он умер 10 января 1493 г. в местности грит марлоу, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Sandes nació aproximadamente 1431, en Fyfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra como hijo de William Sandes. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joanna. Murió el 10 de enero de 1493, en Great Marlow, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
